name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Indianapolis, IN – Cash America Pawn at 3557 Lafayette Rd serves the community with pawn loans and merchandise purchases.
description_long:
The Cash America Pawn location at 3557 Lafayette Rd serves Indianapolis residents and businesses seeking pawn services. This Indianapolis storefront operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM, and is closed Sundays. The standalone pawn shop in Indianapolis, IN provides pawn lending, merchandise buying, and collateral-based loans.

At this Indianapolis Cash America Pawn location at 3557 Lafayette Rd, you can pawn jewelry, electronics, tools, sporting goods, and other items for immediate cash. The store buys merchandise outright and offers short-term loans secured by collateral. For rates, valuations, and to confirm what's accepted, call 317-290-9022.

Whether you're an Indianapolis resident needing quick cash or someone looking to pawn items temporarily, this Lafayette Rd location provides reliable service. Bring a valid ID and the item you wish to pawn or sell. Cash America Pawn is known throughout Indianapolis, IN for trustworthy pawn lending and fair valuations.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America provide exceptional accessibility
No credit check required—serves credit-constrained and unbanked consumers effectively
Immediate cash on-the-spot transactions with no application delays
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) provides institutional oversight and transparency
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability if collateral is forfeited
Diverse collateral acceptance (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Layaway service option offers alternative 10% down payment plan for purchases
cons: Pawn loans are short-term and typically small, not suitable for major financial needs or consolidation
Requires surrendering valuable personal property as collateral, creating personal loss risk if unable to repay
Interest rates and fees on pawn loans, while legal, can be significantly higher than traditional loans or payday alternatives
Not a credit-building service—pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus, so they cannot improve credit scores
Retail merchandise quality and selection vary by location; inventory not guaranteed
best_for: Unbanked or credit-constrained consumers needing immediate cash without credit checks
Individuals with valuable non-essential items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to use as collateral
People seeking short-term bridge loans between paychecks with valuable property to pledge
Consumers interested in browsing affordable secondhand merchandise or layaway purchases
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or no-credit consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable non-essential items and can access one of their 3,300+ locations. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are short-term, secured transactions requiring collateral surrender—not suitable for long-term financing, credit building, or consumers without valuable assets to pledge.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Retail sales of secondhand merchandise from pawn inventory
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying—customers receive cash on-the-spot
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Item purchasing—FirstCash buys almost anything of value
Store locator service to find nearest pawn location
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions (via AFF subsidiary subsidiary with 15,000+ merchant partners)
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 3557 Lafayette Rd, Indianapolis, IN. Pawn loans, buy merchandise, quick cash.
